Meeting Notes: Q3 Strategy Planning Session

Attendees: CEO, CTO, VP Engineering, Product Director

Key Decisions:
1. Migrate core platform to microservices architecture by end of Q4
2. Launch mobile app MVP by September
3. Expand to Australian market in Q1 next year

Technical Priorities:
- API gateway implementation
- Database sharding for scale
- CI/CD pipeline improvements

Budget: $2.5M allocated for infrastructure modernization
Timeline: 6-month execution window starting July 1st
